channel.title: ClawDeck Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
### Added
- **Device identity (Ed25519)** — ClawDeck now generates an Ed25519 keypair on first launch, stored in macOS Keychain. Signs gateway challenge nonce for proper authentication.
- First connection triggers **one-time pairing approval**
- After pairing: full operator scopes everywhere (local + LAN + remote)

### Changed  
- Client ID: `openclaw-macos` (proper native app identifier)
- Removed Origin header workaround
